# CWE-201 positive: API echoes internal secret fields (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-201-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type memberRecord struct {
	Handle   string `json:"handle"`
	Contact  string `json:"contact"`
	TokenKey string `json:"token_key"`
}

// CWE-201 Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Sent Data
// Vulnerable line: returns TokenKey to external caller.
func GetAccountDetails(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, registry map[string]memberRecord) {
	handle := r.PathValue("handle")
	record, ok := registry[handle]
	if !ok {
		http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(record)
}
